summary: Full production readiness review for Appeal Case Manager - Australian criminal appeals app. Tested auth flows, CRUD operations, legal framework, reports, mobile responsiveness. All 31 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working with proper state-specific legislation display.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails with 409 status - chat feature may not work

issues: Horizontal overflow detected - header buttons (Admin, + New) extend beyond viewport width

action_items: Fix mobile dashboard horizontal overflow - header buttons need responsive handling at 375px width
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed
WebSocket chat connection returns 409 Conflict - investigate chat feature

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows working, minor mobile overflow issue)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (6 cases, 41 documents, 35 timeline events)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth flows working (login, register, logout, session). Cases CRUD fully functional. Legal framework correctly returns state-specific legislation (WA case shows WA laws, not NSW). Reports tab shows tiered pricing (FREE Quick Summary, $150 Full Detailed). Admin account bypasses payment locks. Mobile landing page OK, mobile case detail OK, mobile dashboard has minor overflow issue.

auth.get_me_authenticated: PASS - returns user info with is_admin=true

cases.update_case: PASS - updates state from nsw to wa

legal_framework.wa_domestic_violence: PASS - returns WA legislation (no NSW contamination)
legal_framework.empty_state: PASS - returns Unspecified, not NSW default

mobile_responsive.case_detail_375x812: PASS - no horizontal overflow, tabs accessible

design.button_colors: PASS - bright blue (rgb(37,99,235)) with white text
design.no_amber_brown: PASS - no visible amber/brown colors in UI
